specialty: Corrective skincare for Black and brown skin — hyperpigmentation, acne, dark spots, uneven tone

audience.secondary: Black women 30-45, DFW, moms with post-pregnancy skin concerns
audience.psychographics: Invested in self-care, frustrated by generic skincare, wants someone who understands melanin-rich skin

typography_feel: Warm serif headings (editorial/luxury) + clean modern sans body
imagery_style: Warm, inviting, real — NOT clinical or stock. Black women with glowing melanin-rich skin. Natural beauty, warm lighting, intimate spa environment. Close-ups of dewy skin, soft golden light, treatment room ambiance.
mood: Premium but approachable. Luxury spa meets your best friend who happens to be a skincare expert.
voice: Warm, personal, confident. Uses 'Rosebud' for clients. Empowering without being preachy.
